overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path through rolling green prairie. A horse-drawn wagon passes by on the road during the journey. The scene features bright midday lighting with clear blue skies and distant snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt wagon trail

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland

entered.detail: worn dirt path with wagon wheel ruts running through the prairie
rolling green grass hills extending to the horizon
low green shrubs and bushes along the left side of the path
snow-capped mountain range visible on the distant horizon
weathered wooden directional sign with multiple arrow boards
dark smoke rising in the distance against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt wagon trail through expansive green prairie under a clear blue midday sky. Low bushes line the left side of the path while distant snow-capped mountains are visible on the right horizon. A wooden signpost and a distant smoke plume gradually become more visible ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with passing wagon traffic

events.description: horse-drawn wagon passes by on the right side of the path, moving in the same direction
character passes the wooden signpost on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing down the path as a wagon approaches and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wooden wagon with driver moving along the trail and overtaking the character on the right

entered.detail: wooden cargo wagon pulled by horses with a driver seated on top

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn wagon approaches from ahead and passes the character on the right side of the dirt trail. The character continues walking past the wooden signpost on the left. The wagon moves ahead on the path while the distant smoke plume disappears from view as the character progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail approaching distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant mountain range

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the winding dirt trail through the open prairie. The wagon that passed earlier has moved far ahead and faded into the distance. The snow-capped mountains on the right become more prominent as the character progresses along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt wagon trail through an expansive green prairie that gradually brings distant snow-capped mountains into sharper focus. It begins with the character walking under a clear blue midday sky, passing low bushes on the left while a wooden signpost and a plume of smoke emerge in the distance. As the character progresses, a horse-drawn wagon approaches from ahead and passes on the right, coinciding with the character moving past the signpost as the smoke plume fades from view. The scene then shifts as the character continues along the winding trail, watching the wagon recede into the distance. Finally, the perspective opens further across the prairie, making the towering snow-capped mountains on the right horizon increasingly prominent.
